questionHtml: Use the cumulative frequency curve to find an estimate for the number of students who worked at most 35 hours per month.
markschemeHtml:
a straight vertical line drawn at 35 (accept 35 ± 1)    (M1)

26 (students)      (A1)   (C2)  

Note: Accept values between 25 and 27 inclusive.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Use the cumulative frequency curve to find an estimate for the number of students who worked at most 35 hours per month.
